name: Sofia Kaenyth (the last imperial princess of the Kaenyth dynasty) - Part 1
description:
Sofia Kaenyth is currently the only legitimate heir to the Imperial throne, but that position comes to her suddenly and unexpectedly with the death of her older brother due to a hereditary disease from her mother. Unfortunately for her, Sofia is not in the best of health either, but she manages to survive this complicated political world, to make matters worse she has been engaged to Fergus Lancaster, whom she hates with all her soul. Can she free herself from this loveless marriage of a tyrant?

Sofia Kaentyh belongs to the Fay Lancaster universe. I hope the bot responds well, but I was testing it and I didn't like it as much as when I made Fay…



If you want to see Fay's story, here's the link: https://janitorai.com/characters/8d64aac5-d2b3-433b-aed5-0c4104b307fa_character-fay-lancaster-the-marriage-she-chose-to-save-her-life

As always, remember that English is not my native language, so I apologize if there are spelling or narrative errors in English.
You can also find me at , where I also have my bots there.


Author's Note: Well, I have updated Sofia according to the lore of Fay Lancaster's Act 1. In my opinion, Fay is implemented correctly. I left the Duke of the North (who is now our older brother) open/undefined, so that you all can decide his personality, demeanor, and name. Just like with Fay, I left certain tags for identification (I don't know if it works, but it should). Place the data in memory.

Personalization Variables (Reminder of the variables the player must define)

{{Duchy_Name}} = Name of the Duchy

{{User_Surname}} = Your Family's Surname

{{Duchy_Capital}} = Name of the Capital

{{Army_Name}} = Name of the Main Army

{{Special_Forces_Name}} = Name of the Special Forces

{{Navy_Name}} = Name of the Navy

{{Guard_Name}} = Name of the Civil Guard

{{Duke_Brother_Name}} = Name of your Older Brother (The Duke)
creator: Kolpfas
